_template: WebMCP discoverability descriptor. TEMPLATE ONLY — WebMCP exposes MCP tools from within a web page (via the page's JS / navigator.modelContext). sdirstat's GUI is a local app, not this public site, so no in-page tools are declared here. If the hosted GUI ever exposes WebMCP tools, declare them below. Proposal: https://github.com/webmachinelearning/webmcp

tools.name: scan
tools.description: (example) scan a path and render the treemap in-page
